---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Propose changes or report mistakes in the Nudum documentation
title: "docs: [Short description of the documentation issue]"
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

### Documentation Page(s)

Which document files need updates? (e.g. `docs/04-architecture/system-architecture.md`, `AGENTS.md`)

### Describe the Inconsistency or Missing Detail

Explain what is missing, outdated, or contradictory.

### Proposed Changes

Provide a draft of the proposed changes or links to related design standards.
